So fun - learned a lot about our home town and enjoyed all the food.  We are Bay Area natives and we learned a lot!  Strongly recommend for anyone who is interested in learning and who likes to experience culture through food.

We have done walking food tours in several countries and this was certainly one of the very best.  Stuart was knowledgeable, very well organized, and attentive to details.  He insured that each guest had a memorable experience.

Stuart is the best tour guide!! He is personable and very knowledgeable about San Francisco. If you have never been to the area choose this tour. if you want to understand the city’s historical events and eat great food this is it! There was so much food!!!! Thanks Stuart you are the best!
